product_data.Features: 16-inch Liquid Retina XDR display, Apple M3 Pro chip, 18GB unified memory, 512GB SSD, 22-hour battery life, MagSafe 3 charging, Thunderbolt 4 ports

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello! I'm very interested in the Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro) you have listed. It looks like a fantastic machine. I was wondering if there might be any flexibility on the price?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Hello! I'm glad to hear you're interested in the MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro). It's indeed a top-of-the-line machine. I can offer you a special price of $2,300 for it today.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: That's a fantastic machine, but $2,300 is quite a bit higher than I was hoping to spend. My absolute maximum for this purchase would be $1400.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand your budget concerns. However, the MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro) is a premium product with top-notch features. I can offer you a discounted price of $1,800, which is the wholesale price.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate the offer, but $1,800 is still beyond my budget. I simply cannot afford it at that price.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I completely understand your situation. Unfortunately, I'm unable to go below the wholesale price of $1,800 for the MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro). If you have any other questions or need assistance with anything else, feel free to let me know.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I understand that's your lowest price. Unfortunately, it's still beyond my budget, so I won't be able to purchase it at $1,800.
